01 — Profile

ABOUT ME

I'm a Mechatronics and Mechanical Designer based in Ontario, Canada, with hands-on experience spanning chemical manufacturing, printing production, industrial lighting, and precision component design.

My work lives at the intersection of 3D modelling, engineering drawings, and design-for-manufacturability — translating complex requirements into parts that actually get built, work in the field, and hold up under real-world conditions.

From PLC-integrated dosing systems at Meghmani's multi-plant operations in India, to SolidWorks tooling supporting Linamar's shop floor, to a 600+ SKU warning light catalogue at SWS — I've designed across industries and environments.

Currently at SWS Warning Lights Inc. in Niagara Falls, creating manufacturing-ready drawings and 3D models for heavy-duty vehicle lighting systems built for Canadian conditions.

3D CAD
SolidWorks (Advanced), Autodesk Fusion 360, Autodesk Inventor, Revit, Solid Edge, Part Modelling, Assembly Modelling, Surface Modelling, Weldments, Sheet Metal
2D CAD
AutoCAD, SolidWorks Drawings, Technical Drawings, Manufacturing-ready Drawings, Detail & Assembly Drawings, Exploded Views, Section Views, Auxiliary Views, Title Blocks, Drawing Templates, Parts Lists, Revision Clouds & Change Tracking
Engineering Drawing
GD&T (ASME Y14.5), Tolerance Stack-ups, BOMs, Revision Control, Drawing Standards, First & Third Angle Projection
Simulation & Analysis
SolidWorks Simulation, Stress & Pressure Analysis, Material Strength Calculations, Static Load Analysis, Thermal & Vibration Considerations
Mechanical Systems
Pneumatics, Hydraulics, Gears & Drivetrain, Conveyor Systems, Pumps & Compressors, Heat Exchangers, Reverse Engineering, Fastener Selection
Manufacturing
DFM, CNC Machining Awareness, Sheet Metal Forming & Press Operations, Welding & Fabrication, 3D Printing & Rapid Prototyping, Casting Considerations
Quality & Standards
ISO 9001, CE Compliance, Lean Manufacturing, 5S, Root Cause Analysis, FMEA Awareness, Continuous Improvement
Project & Collaboration
Cross-functional Team Leadership, Vendor Sourcing & Qualification, ECO & Change Management, Technical Documentation, Stakeholder Communication
Rendering & Visualization
SolidWorks Visualize, PhotoView 360, Model Rendering, Presentation-ready CAD Outputs
02 — Career

EXPERIENCE

Sept 2025 — Present
SWS Warning Lights
Niagara Falls, ON
Technical Drawing Specialist
  • Developed 3D models and manufacturing drawings for heavy-duty warning light products — traffic arrows, beacons, mounting solutions — in SolidWorks and Fusion 360, ensuring production readiness across a 600+ SKU catalogue.
  • Created precise 2D technical drawings and CAD documentation in AutoCAD with GD&T (ASME Y14.5) standards, supporting manufacturing, assembly, and QC teams.
  • Designed enclosures, brackets, and modular components for the Titan Series product line, applying DFM principles to reduce design-to-production iteration cycles.
Sept 2022 — Sept 2025
TRIGO
Guelph, ON
Designer (Part-Time) — supporting Linamar Corp.
  • Designed and modelled production tooling, fixtures, and sheet metal components in SolidWorks 3D, building full assembly models to support high-volume precision manufacturing on the shop floor.
  • Delivered accurate assembly designs to tight manufacturing tolerances, ensuring fit and function across Linamar's advanced manufacturing environment.
Oct 2020 — Jan 2022
Meghmani Organics
India
Mechanical Design Engineer
  • Engineered PLC-integrated chemical dosing and mixing systems across multi-plant operations, cutting manual intervention by 30% and improving process repeatability in agrochemical production lines.
  • Performed stress, pressure, and material strength analysis on process equipment; led cross-functional teams across mechanical, electrical, and field service to deliver projects on time and within spec.
Sept 2019 — Aug 2020
Huber Group
India
Mechanical Designer
  • Reverse-engineered and redesigned high-wear conveyor components on active printing ink production lines, extending service life by 2 years and eliminating $12K in annual maintenance costs.
  • Engineered and integrated self-aligning pneumatic rollers into conveyor systems, reducing unplanned downtime across high-volume manufacturing operations.
  • Drove Lean-based process improvements identifying and eliminating mechanical bottlenecks while maintaining CE compliance across retrofitted equipment.
03 — Work Samples

PROJECTS

01
Titan 60″ Fleet Arrow — #57760-3
Developed full manufacturing-ready drawings and 3D models in Autodesk Fusion 360 for the Titan 60″ Fleet High Profile Traffic Arrow at SWS Warning Lights. SAE Class 1, IP67 & IP69K rated, anodized aluminum body — engineered to meet Canadian fleet and highway durability requirements.
Fusion 360Manufacturing DrawingsGD&TSWS Warning Lights
02
Fully Automated TC-12 Arrow Board — #55100
Created detailed 3D models and manufacturing drawings in Autodesk Fusion 360 for the TC-12 Fully Automated Arrow Board at SWS Warning Lights. Features automated wings on precision-machined tracks, 14 dual-optic LED modules, anodized 10ga aluminum frame — compliant with Ontario Traffic Manual Book 7 and SAE Class 1.
Fusion 360Manufacturing DrawingsAutoCADSWS Warning Lights
03
Self-Aligning Pneumatic Conveyor Roller
Engineered and integrated a self-aligning pneumatic roller system into active printing ink conveyor lines at Huber. Each roller end is independently controlled by a double-acting pneumatic cylinder via a pivot ball-joint linkage, enabling automatic belt re-centring without stopping production. Reduced unplanned downtime across high-volume manufacturing operations and extended equipment service life.
SolidWorksAutoCADPneumaticsConveyor SystemsGD&TDFM
04
Automated Parcel Sorting — Cross Belt Conveyor
Full system design of an automated cross belt conveyor parcel sorting system. Large-scale assembly with structural members, drive components, and sorting mechanisms.
SolidWorksLarge AssemblyAutomationConveyor
05
Helical Planetary Gearbox
Fully detailed and functional model simulating real-world mechanical motion. Designed for manufacturability and assembly efficiency using advanced gear mates and simulation.
SolidWorksGear MatesSimulationRendering
06
Kobelco Wheel Loader — 1:38 Scale
Scaled replica assembled from multiple sub-assemblies and solid parts. Advanced mates and constraints deliver realistic motion akin to the actual machine.
SolidWorksComplex AssemblyAdvanced Mates
07
Inertia Base Frame — Chilling Pump
Structural frame designed to minimize vibrations and ensure precision alignment for heavy chilling plant pump installations. Built with Weldments and Sheet Metal features.
SolidWorksWeldmentsSheet MetalStructural
08
Mobile Stand — QI Charger Integration
Flatpack stand with integrated QI wireless charger support. Designed for minimal material use, clean cable routing, and flat-pack shipping. Validated via 3D printing.
SolidWorks3D PrintingDFMPrototyping
09
Switch Box Cover
Sheet metal enclosure designed for ventilation, heat transfer, and complete circuit protection. Optimized for basic press operations to minimize production cost.
SolidWorksSheet MetalThermal Design
10
Heat Exchanger
Detailed shell-and-tube heat exchanger with accurate tube sheet geometry, nozzle placement, and support saddle design. Built to reflect real industrial configurations.
SolidWorksPressure VesselThermal Systems
11
Screw Air Compressor Shaft
High-fidelity rotor shaft model with accurate helical screw profile geometry. Demonstrates advanced surface and feature modelling capabilities in SolidWorks.
SolidWorksHelical FeaturesPrecision Parts
12
Pump Impeller
Closed centrifugal pump impeller with accurate blade geometry, hub profile, and shroud surfaces. Designed with manufacturability considerations for casting or machining.
SolidWorksFluid MechanicsPrecision Parts
13
SpaceX Dragon Capsule 2
Complex curved surface model of the Dragon Capsule 2, demonstrating reference-matched aerospace geometry, surface modelling, and rendering techniques in SolidWorks.
SolidWorksSurface ModellingRendering
